name: Artificial Boxwood Plant - Threshold™: Indoor Faux Greenery, Melamine Pot, Tabletop Decor, 4.3" Height
description:
Add a touch of refreshing and fuss-free greenery to your home with this Artificial Boxwood Plant from Threshold™. This decorative plant showcases light green boxwood branches arranged together to bring a lovely, natural look to your decor, and it comes housed inside a melamine pot for easy display. Best of all, the artificial construction means it stays beautiful without the hassle of watering or pruning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
